required_skills: Subject matter expertise and deep domain knowledge in a core academic or professional discipline
Curriculum development and learning outcomes design aligned with institutional and accreditation standards
Classroom instruction and pedagogy — delivering engaging lectures, seminars, and discussion-based sessions
Student assessment design including rubric creation, examinations, assignments, and grading
Academic advising and mentorship of undergraduate or postgraduate students
Research and scholarly activity including publications, conference presentations, or applied research projects
Learning Management System (LMS) administration and blended or online course delivery
Collaborative participation in departmental governance, faculty committees, and academic policy development
preferred_skills: Experience with active learning methodologies — flipped classroom, case-based learning, problem-based learning (PBL)
Grant writing and experience securing external research funding from national or international bodies
Familiarity with accreditation processes such as NAAC, NBA, AACSB, ABET, or regional equivalents
Experience supervising doctoral or master's level research theses
Industry or professional practice experience complementing academic expertise
Competency in instructional design tools and e-learning content development for hybrid delivery
Track record of publishing in peer-reviewed journals indexed in Scopus, Web of Science, or equivalent
responsibilities: Design and deliver high-quality instruction across assigned undergraduate and postgraduate courses, ensuring content rigor, pedagogical effectiveness, and student engagement
Develop course syllabi, learning outcomes, assessment frameworks, and instructional materials aligned with program objectives and accreditation standards
Conduct original research or scholarly work in the discipline, contributing to publications, conference proceedings, or applied research outputs on a regular basis
Provide academic advising and individualized mentorship to students, supporting their academic progress, career planning, and research development
Design and administer fair, rigorous, and outcomes-aligned assessments including examinations, projects, case studies, and continuous evaluation components
Participate actively in faculty governance — attending department meetings, serving on academic committees, and contributing to curriculum review and policy decisions
Collaborate with industry partners, visiting practitioners, and interdisciplinary colleagues to enrich curriculum relevance and student exposure to real-world applications
Maintain and continuously update course content to reflect current developments, emerging research, and evolving industry practices within the discipline
Supervise and evaluate student capstone projects, dissertations, internships, and independent study programs with structured feedback and academic rigour
Contribute to institutional initiatives including accreditation preparation, program reviews, student recruitment events, and departmental outreach activities
